---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="contact-page">

  <h1 class="contact-heading">Get In Touch</h1>
  <p class="contact-subtext">
    I'm open to research collaborations, consulting work, and data science roles.
    Feel free to reach out — I'd love to connect.
  </p>

  <div class="contact-links">

    <div class="contact-item">
      <div class="contact-icon"><i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i></div>
      <div class="contact-label">EMAIL</div>
      <a href="mailto:jyontika@u.northwestern.edu">jyontika@u.northwestern.edu</a>
    </div>

    <div class="contact-item">
      <div class="contact-icon"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i></div>
      <div class="contact-label">LINKEDIN</div>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/jyontika" target="_blank">linkedin.com/in/jyontika</a>
    </div>

    <div class="contact-item">
      <div class="contact-icon"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i></div>
      <div class="contact-label">GITHUB</div>
      <a href="https://github.com/jyontika" target="_blank">github.com/jyontika</a>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="contact-divider"></div>

  <form class="contact-form" action="https://formspree.io/f/xkoalkaz" method="POST">
    <div class="form-group">
      <label>NAME</label>
      <input type="text" name="name" placeholder="Your name" required>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label>EMAIL</label>
      <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="your@email.com" required>
    </div>
    <div class="form-group">
      <label>MESSAGE</label>
      <textarea name="message" rows="6" placeholder="What's on your mind?" required></textarea>
    </div>
    <button type="submit" class="submit-btn">SEND MESSAGE</button>
  </form>

</div>
```
